name: diptrace_fd1
description: Real 2-layer board exported from DipTrace (the 'mainboard' of the FD1 project): both copper layers, both masks, top silk, a board outline and a plated drill file.
source: codepainters/FD1 (BSD 3-clause, (c) 2014 Przemyslaw Wegrzyn), via gerbonara's test corpus (tests/resources/diptrace)
notes:
Third CAD dialect in the corpus (DipTrace). Files renamed to conventional extensions; contents are byte-identical to upstream.

Not asserted: silkscreen_clearance, silkscreen_over_mask_defined_pads (fail on every real board -- #19); copper_to_edge_distance, which reads 0.0007 mm here and 0.000 mm on pcbtools_full (#18); via_to_copper_clearance at 0.000; component_to_component_spacing, which needs placement data (#14); and via_in_pad_thermal_balance.
